user_prompt: now implement the comment inside src\bt_pairing_demo.cpp
agent_reply: - `bt_pairing_demo_pair()` and `bt_pairing_demo_pair(BtPairingDemoCredentials *saved_credentials)`: starts BT/HFP, opens Classic BT discoverable/connectable pairing for 60 seconds, accepts SSP/PIN pairing, then shuts discoverability off.
- `bt_pairing_demo_connect_saved(const BtPairingDemoCredentials &saved_credentials)`: reconnects HFP using the saved peer address.

The saved app-level credentials are `version`, `remote_bda`, `remote_name`, and `valid`. The actual Bluetooth link key/bond material is maintained by Bluedroid in NVS, so the saved record points back to that bond.
